allow: PowerShell($client = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $client.Headers.Add\("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36"\); $html = $client.DownloadString\("https://lste.lu/press/"\); $html.Length)

PowerShell($client = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $client.Headers.Add\("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36"\); $html = $client.DownloadString\("https://lste.lu/press/"\); Write-Host "Lines: $\(\($html -split "`n"\).Count\)"; Write-Host "Chars: $\($html.Length\)")

PowerShell($client = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $client.Headers.Add\("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36"\); $html = $client.DownloadString\("https://lste.lu/press/"\); # Find body start $bodyStart = $html.IndexOf\('<body'\); $bodyContent = $html.Substring\($bodyStart\); Write-Host "Body length: $\($bodyContent.Length\)"; $bodyContent | Out-File -FilePath "C:\\Users\\Lucas\\Documents\\Sites\\LSTE\\press_body.html" -Encoding utf8)

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://lste.lu/previous-editions/edition-2014/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 -Headers @{"User-Agent"="Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36"}; Write-Output "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Content length: $\($response.Content.Length\)")

PowerShell($client = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $client.Headers.Add\("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36"\); $html = $client.DownloadString\("https://lste.lu/press/"\); Write-Host "Total: $\($html.Length\)"; # Check last 5000 chars $html.Substring\($html.Length - 5000\))

PowerShell($client = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $client.Headers.Add\("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36"\); $html = $client.DownloadString\("https://lste.lu/press/"\); $tail = $html.Substring\($html.Length - 3000\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("C:\\Users\\Lucas\\Documents\\Sites\\LSTE\\press_tail.txt", $tail\); Write-Host "Saved tail")

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://lste.lu/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 -Headers @{"User-Agent"="Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36"}; Write-Output "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Content length: $\($response.Content.Length\)")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Net.Http; $handler = New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClientHandler; $client = New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClient\($handler\); $client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add\("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/120"\); $response = $client.GetAsync\("https://lste.lu/press/"\).Result; $bytes = $response.Content.ReadAsByteArrayAsync\(\).Result; $html = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); Write-Host "Length: $\($html.Length\)"; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("C:\\Users\\Lucas\\Documents\\Sites\\LSTE\\press_full.html", $html\); Write-Host "Saved full HTML")

PowerShell($html = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("C:\\Users\\Lucas\\Documents\\Sites\\LSTE\\press_full.html"\); $bodyStart = $html.IndexOf\("<body "\); Write-Host "Body starts at: $bodyStart"; $bodyContent = $html.Substring\($bodyStart\); Write-Host "Body length: $\($bodyContent.Length\)"; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("C:\\Users\\Lucas\\Documents\\Sites\\LSTE\\press_body_only.html", $bodyContent\); Write-Host "Saved")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Net.Http; $handler = New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClientHandler; $client = New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClient\($handler\); $client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add\("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/120"\); $response = $client.GetAsync\("https://lste.lu/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?categories=&per_page=20&_fields=id,title,excerpt,content,date,slug,featured_media,_links"\).Result; $json = $response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync\(\).Result; Write-Host "JSON length: $\($json.Length\)"; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("C:\\Users\\Lucas\\Documents\\Sites\\LSTE\\press_posts.json", $json\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Net.Http; $handler = New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClientHandler; $client = New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClient\($handler\); $client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add\("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/120"\); # Try to get posts with category "press" or all posts $response = $client.GetAsync\("https://lste.lu/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?per_page=20&_fields=id,title,excerpt,date,slug,link,featured_media"\).Result; $json = $response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync\(\).Result; Write-Host $json)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Net.Http; $handler = New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClientHandler; $client = New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClient\($handler\); $client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add\("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/120"\); $response = $client.GetAsync\("https://lste.lu/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?per_page=20"\).Result; $statusCode = [int]$response.StatusCode; Write-Host "Status: $statusCode"; $json = $response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync\(\).Result; Write-Host "Length: $\($json.Length\)"; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("C:\\Users\\Lucas\\Documents\\Sites\\LSTE\\wp_posts.json", $json\))
